## Support

If **Resume** helped you publish a stronger résumé / portfolio site faster, the best next step is the dedicated review page:

- Review page: https://happysnaker.github.io/review/
- Direct support page: https://happysnaker.github.io/support/
- GitHub Sponsor button (if shown): routes to the same review / support flow
- WeChat Pay / Alipay QR codes are listed on the support page
- Async review is a good fit if you want feedback on your résumé site, GitHub profile, pinned repos, or README
